svg.title: Reviewer proof panel for the option pricing library
svg.desc: Workflow strip from static surface to eSSVI smoothing to local vol to PDE repricing, four published proof metrics, and three inlined thumbnails reused from tracked docs assets.

text.font-family: DejaVu Sans, Liberation Sans, Arial, sans-serif
DejaVu Sans, Liberation Sans, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Fast scan of the repo's strongest surface, smoothing, local-vol, and PDE evidence.

text.font-family: DejaVu Sans, Liberation Sans, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Metrics are copied from the published eSSVI bridge and local vol + PDE proof pages.
